form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Paw Stella beaten 10 lengths (23.14) in a Grade 5. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Paw Stella beaten 10 lengths (23.14) in a Grade 5. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but she does have a good record at the track and trip, including two wins. Has a strong 22.66 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but she does have a good record at the track and trip, including two wins. Has a strong 22.66 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.09) at Healesville in a Grade 5 H, finishing seventh and beaten 4 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Can feature with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (17.09) at Healesville in a Grade 5 H, finishing seventh and beaten 4 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when fourth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Has ability and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (24.24) when third at Bendigo in a Special conditions H. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (24.24) when third at Bendigo in a Special conditions H. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (22.62) at this track over 400m. Although unsuccessful last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with him.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (22.62) at this track over 400m. Although unsuccessful last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with him.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th in a Grade 4/5 on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Ubiquitous beaten 14 lengths (23.48). Racing well and has to be included.

formComments.comment: Last start finished 6th in a Grade 4/5 on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Ubiquitous beaten 14 lengths (23.48). Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (22.96) when third at this track in a Grade 4/5. Has never missed the frame from four starts from the draw, including a win. Tough field and looking to others this time.
